ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team working on the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., high, low) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the team was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the component (e.g., 100nF, 1kOhm) */,
  "package" TEXT /* Package type of the component (e.g., C_1206_3216Metric, R_0805_2012Metric) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., capacitor, resistor) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the component was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the component was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_package FOREIGN KEY ("package") REFERENCES component_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES component_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the component type was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the component type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the component package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component package */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the component package was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the component package was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuit_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit board design */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit board */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the circuit board */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the board belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the board design */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who created the board */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the board design was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the board design was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the board design (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "pcb_layout" TEXT /* PCB layout file (e.g., Gerber, Eagle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circuit_boards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circuit_boards_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "board_components" (
  "board_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component placement on a board */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "position_x" REAL /* X position of the component on the board */,
  "position_y" REAL /* Y position of the component on the board */,
  "rotation" INTEGER /* Rotation angle of the component */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the board (e.g., top, bottom) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the component was placed on the board */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the component placement was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_board_components_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_board_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access event was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the access event was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "board_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the circuit board */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the circuit board was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access event was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the access event was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_board_access_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_board_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the inspector */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the quality control record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the quality control record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspector_details ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspector_details" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the inspector belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the inspector was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the inspector was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspector_details_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the manufacturer was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the manufacturer was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_supplier_link" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the component from the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the component from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_supplier_link_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES supplier ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_supplier_link_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
